summary: P1 Features Testing Complete - Hen/Rooster Type Toggle, AI Features, and Paywall Pricing all working correctly

features_tested: Type toggle (Höna/Tupp) visible in Add hen modal with emojis 🐔 and 🐓
Creating hen with default hen_type='hen' works
Rooster displays with 🐓 emoji in list
Header shows separate counts: 'X hens • Y roosters'
Page title updated to 'My Hens & Roosters'
Update hen_type via API works correctly
Daily Tip endpoint (/api/ai/daily-tip) requires authentication - returns 401 for unauthenticated
Daily Tip returns tip, date, and signature for logged-in user
Ask Agda endpoint (/api/ai/advisor) requires authentication - returns 401 for unauthenticated
Ask Agda returns response for logged-in user (with preview=true for non-premium)

p1_iap_pricing.notes: Pricing defined in paywall.tsx: 19 kr/mån (monthly) and 149 kr/år (yearly with Spara 35% badge). Web uses Stripe checkout redirect.

seed_data_creation: Created test hens TEST_Gull-Britt (hen) and TEST_Roffe (rooster) during UI testing - cleaned up via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and working: 1) Hen/Rooster type toggle in hens.tsx modal saves hen_type to backend and displays correctly with emoji and badge. 2) AI features (daily-tip and ask-agda) work for authenticated users with preview mode for non-premium. 3) Paywall pricing hardcoded as 19kr/mån and 149kr/år in paywall.tsx (dynamic from RevenueCat for native). All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend needed expo restart to reflect latest code changes.
